ogTitle: Jacobs Well vs Jaffa: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jacobs Well and Jaffa.
heading: Jacobs Well vs Jaffa — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jacobs Well, Queensland and Jaffa, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jaffa has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Jacobs Well (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jacobs Well or Jaffa safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jacobs Well has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Jaffa scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jacobs Well scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Jaffa scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jacobs Well or Jaffa?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jaffa has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
